description: Switch Locomotion Module is a ProtoFlux node that switches a user to a locomotion by name.

fields.* ([[Impulses|Call]]): Call this to switch the locomotion for the TargetUser (User).
fields.TargetUser: The user to switch the locomotion they are using to walk when this node is triggered.
fields.ModuleName:
the name of the locomotion slot that the user should switch to.

Ex: "Walk/Run (with climbing)", "Fly", "Noclip", "Teleport", (etc.)
fields.ExactMatch: Whether to switch the lomotion if it is a partial match (false) or switch only if the name exactly matches (true).
fields.OnSwitched: Sends an impulse after * (Call) was called and a locomotion was successfully found and switched to.
fields.OnNotFound: Sends an impulse after * (Call) was called and the specified locomotion was not found.
